stars.highlights: AI Reviewer is a Python tool that uses AI to automatically review code changes, providing feedback on code quality, potential bugs, and adherence to best practices. It integrates with GitHub to analyze pull requests and suggest improvements.
stars.worthReading: This repository offers a practical approach to automating code reviews with AI, which can save developers time and improve code quality. It's worth exploring for teams looking to streamline their review process.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is low (1 star, no traction), relevance is moderate (AI tooling for code review), concreteness is moderate (Python code, but no description or details).

stars.description: [ICML'26] Code and website for Self-Flow: Self-Supervised Flow Matching for Scalable Multi-Modal Synthesis
[IROS 2025 Best Paper Award Finalist & IEEE TRO 2026] The Large-scale Manipulation Platform for Scalable and Intelligent Embodied Systems

FlashRT is a high-performance realtime inference engine for small-batch, latency-sensitive AI workloads. The flagship integration is production VLA control for Pi0, Pi0.5, GROOT N1.6, and Pi0-FAST. Also support llm e.g, qwen3.6-27B
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
Small efficient runtime package for quantized diffusion models
LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer
